3245180.name: Fantasy Grounds - Savage Tales of Horror: Volume 1
3245180.description:
Savage Tales of Horror: Volume 1

Savage Tales of Horror is a collection of
five adventures for Savage Worlds. It requires only the core rules to play.
Dare to wander the Black Forest in search of witches foul, where you may lose your soul...to the
Face Snatchers !
Brave the bitter northern chill, where brain freeze is the least of your worries. At least someone will keep those beautiful looks of yours in
Cold Storage !
Relax for a lakeside Spring Break at
The Retreat - if you can ignore the scratching at the door, and the deadly smiles of the townsfolk!
Investigate by gaslight the ghostly hauntings of the magnificent
Manor of Blood . It's very inviting, but doesn't want you to leave!
The suspicious death of an old friend drives you to find answers somewhere in the
Moonshine Blues of New Orleans, where mobsters and magic mingle!
Face Snatchers may be used in the
Savage Worlds of Solomon Kane setting.
Moonshine Blues may be used in the
Deadlands Noir setting.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Calum Mc Dermott
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
